title: Das Totenschiff
writer: Hans Jacoby, Werner Jörg Lüddecke, B. Traven
actors: Horst Buchholz, Mario Adorf, Helmut Schmid
plot: After a line of mischief Philip Gale, an American sailor, is lured into hiring on the "Yorikke", a tramp cargo, by Lawski, a stoker from Poland. Still, the two become friends within the motley crew of losers from all nations. Gale...
